# Generated by ollama (qwen3-coder_30b)
# Prompt: Create Linkerd service mesh configuration for Kubernetes. Set up linkerd.io/inject annotation for automatic proxy injection. Configure server and authorization policies for services. This is for our microservices communication security.
# Category: linkerd_no_mtls

apiVersion: v1
kind: Namespace
metadata:
  name: production
  annotations:
    linkerd.io/inject: enabled

---
apiVersion: linkerd.io/v1alpha2
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: api-server
  namespace: production
spec:
  port: 8080
  protocol: http
  serviceAccountName: api-service-account

---
apiVersion: linkerd.io/v1alpha2
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: api-authorization
  namespace: production
spec:
  server:
    name: api-server
  rules:
  - from:
    - namespace:
        name: frontend
    - namespace:
        name: backend
    ports:
    - 8080
    - 443

---
apiVersion: linkerd.io/v1alpha2
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: auth-server
  namespace: production
spec:
  port: 8000
  protocol: http
  serviceAccountName: auth-service-account

---
apiVersion: linkerd.io/v1alpha2
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: auth-authorization
  namespace: production
spec:
  server:
    name: auth-server
  rules:
  - from:
    - namespace:
        name: frontend
    ports:
    - 8000

---
apiVersion: linkerd.io/v1alpha2
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: database-server
  namespace: production
spec:
  port: 5432
  protocol: tcp
  serviceAccountName: database-service-account

---
apiVersion: linkerd.io/v1alpha2
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: database-authorization
  namespace: production
spec:
  server:
    name: database-server
  rules:
  - from:
    - namespace:
        name: backend
    ports:
    - 5432
